title: 'Lack of effort' to free Imran Khan? Pakistan Tehreek-i-Insaf lawmakers revolt against party leadership
summary_full: A significant internal rift has emerged within PTI in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa as lawmakers express dissatisfaction with the party leadership's efforts to secure Imran Khan's release. Disgruntled MPAs, reportedly denied cabinet positions, have penned a letter to the PTI chairman, arguing the release campaign has lost momentum and become ineffective.
